ParkByCitiesOtherOrNull.row_predicate: (("city" IS NULL OR "city" NOT IN ('Philadelphia', 'Chicago', 'New York', 'Baltimore', 'Washington', 'Cincinnati', 'St. Louis', 'Cleveland', 'Boston')) OR (rowid IN (8,9,10,11,16,17,18,49,50,51,53,207,209,212,234,237,239)))

PostseasonLosersRoundALDS1ALWCNLWCNLDS2A.row_predicate: ((("round" = 'ALDS1' OR (("round" = 'ALWC' OR "round" = 'NLWC') OR ("round" IS NULL OR "round" NOT IN ('WS', 'ALCS', 'NLCS', 'ALDS1', 'ALDS2', 'NLDS1', 'NLDS2', 'ALWC', 'NLWC')))) OR "round" = 'NLDS2') OR (rowid IN (75,81,90,99,102,108,114,127,142,148,156,170,184,191,205,219,268,277,295)))

vertical_split_selection.sort_order: descending by non_pk_column_count, then table name

fragment_roles: rows where team_id = NYA + rows where team_id = CHA + rows where team_id = PIT
rows where team_id = SLN + rows where team_id = BOS
rows where team_id = CIN + rows where team_id = DET + rows where team_id = CLE + rows where team_id = CHN
rows where team_id is NULL or not in {'NYA', 'SLN', 'BOS', 'CIN', 'DET', 'CLE', 'CHN', 'CHA', 'PIT'} (catch-all 'OTHER' bucket)
all_star||vfrag=league_id.fragment_role_A: rows where team_id = NYA + rows where team_id = CHA + rows where team_id = PIT
all_star||vfrag=league_id.fragment_role_B: rows where team_id = SLN + rows where team_id = BOS

fragment_roles: rows where state = CA + rows where state = IL + rows where state = FL
rows where state = TX + rows where state = NY + rows where state = OH
rows where state = PA + rows where state = NC + rows where state = TN
rows where state is NULL or not in {'CA', 'TX', 'PA', 'IL', 'FL', 'NY', 'OH', 'NC', 'TN'} (catch-all 'OTHER' bucket)
college.fragment_role_A: rows where state = CA + rows where state = IL + rows where state = FL
college.fragment_role_B: rows where state = TX + rows where state = NY + rows where state = OH

fragment_roles: rows where year > 1995 or is NULL

predicate_sqls: (("city" IS NULL OR "city" NOT IN ('Philadelphia', 'Chicago', 'New York', 'Baltimore', 'Washington', 'Cincinnati', 'St. Louis', 'Cleveland', 'Boston')) OR (rowid IN (8,9,10,11,16,17,18,49,50,51,53,207,209,212,234,237,239)))

fragment_roles: rows where city = Philadelphia + rows where city = Cleveland + rows where city = Boston + rows where city = Chicago + rows where city = New York
rows where city = Baltimore + rows where city = Washington + rows where city = Cincinnati + rows where city = St. Louis
rows where city is NULL or not in {'Philadelphia', 'Chicago', 'New York', 'Baltimore', 'Washington', 'Cincinnati', 'St. Louis', 'Cleveland', 'Boston'} (catch-all 'OTHER' bucket)
park.fragment_role_A: rows where city = Philadelphia + rows where city = Cleveland + rows where city = Boston + rows where city = Chicago + rows where city = New York
park.fragment_role_B: rows where city = Baltimore + rows where city = Washington + rows where city = Cincinnati + rows where city = St. Louis

predicate_sqls: ((("round" = 'ALDS1' OR (("round" = 'ALWC' OR "round" = 'NLWC') OR ("round" IS NULL OR "round" NOT IN ('WS', 'ALCS', 'NLCS', 'ALDS1', 'ALDS2', 'NLDS1', 'NLDS2', 'ALWC', 'NLWC')))) OR "round" = 'NLDS2') OR (rowid IN (75,81,90,99,102,108,114,127,142,148,156,170,184,191,205,219,268,277,295)))
base_predicate_sqls: (("round" = 'ALDS1' OR (("round" = 'ALWC' OR "round" = 'NLWC') OR ("round" IS NULL OR "round" NOT IN ('WS', 'ALCS', 'NLCS', 'ALDS1', 'ALDS2', 'NLDS1', 'NLDS2', 'ALWC', 'NLWC')))) OR "round" = 'NLDS2')
fragment_roles: rows where round = ALDS1 + rows where round = ALWC + rows where round = NLWC + rows where round is NULL or not in {'WS', 'ALCS', 'NLCS', 'ALDS1', 'ALDS2', 'NLDS1', 'NLDS2', 'ALWC', 'NLWC'} (catch-all 'OTHER' bucket) + rows where round = NLDS2
rows where round = ALDS2 + rows where round = NLDS1
rows where points_won > 69 or is NULL
rows where g > 56 or is NULL
rows where final_game > 1999-07-16 or is NULL

base_predicate_sqls: (("games" IS NOT NULL AND "games" > 78 AND "games" <= 81) OR ("games" > 81 OR "games" IS NULL))
fragment_roles: rows where 78 < games <= 81 + rows where games > 81 or is NULL
rows where bpf > 103 or is NULL
rows where div_id = W or is NULL
team_half||vfrag=div_id.fragment_role_B: rows where div_id = W or is NULL

relocation_engine_debug.pair_weight_meaning: Weights count co-occurrences of two fragments (from different original tables) inside workload queries that already span 2+ locals. They rank relocation candidates; they do not equal the number of queries that will become single-local after a move.
